options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: factions
options.description:
Which factions' units to shuffle as items. Other factions will be unavailable.

Clubber will always be included unless another starting unit is set in Start Inventory from Pool.

options.name: progressive_factions
options.description: Receive units as progressive items for each faction, unlocking the next unit within that faction.

options.name: secret_type
options.description:
How secret unlocks are treated in the game.

- **None**: No secrets are available.
- **Regular**: Unit unlocks count as locations. Maps must be reachable to be available in sandbox.
- **No Unlocks**: Same as regular, but secrets in unlockable maps are not included. Unlocking Farmer Snow or Fantasy Good/Evil when not an available campaign is a single check.
- **All**: All secrets are available in sandbox from the start.

options.name: required_campaigns
options.description: The set of campaigns to complete to win the game.

options.name: additional_campaigns
options.description: Additional available campaigns that have locations, but which aren't needed for goal.

options.name: hidden_campaign_unlocks
options.description:
Whether hidden campaigns must be unlocked to become available.
If Secret Location Type is regular or no unlocks, this will require the unlock locations to be reachable in campaign.

Does nothing if no unlockable campaigns are available or Secret Location Type is all. The Legacy campaign is always unlocked from the start.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: You Won't Make Us Walk The Plank (Pirate-15)
BOOM And The Units Go Down (Pirate-24)
Lone Ranger and his friends (Wild West-15)

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
options: You Won't Make Us Walk The Plank (Pirate-15)
BOOM And The Units Go Down (Pirate-24)
Lone Ranger and his friends (Wild West-15)

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.
options: You Won't Make Us Walk The Plank (Pirate-15)
BOOM And The Units Go Down (Pirate-24)
Lone Ranger and his friends (Wild West-15)

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
